name: Soy ANONIMO432HZ
description: My name is ANONIMO432HZ and I am a full-stack developer
my-description: I focus on web development and cybersecurity. I am constantly learning technologies and always seeking to learn new tools to enrich my skills and apply best practices.
design-info: Design of attractive interfaces for both web and mobile users, making the most of the brand or product that the client wants to leverage on their website.
development-info: Creation of well-structured web pages, good responsive design, attractive color palette, with interactions that give the user satisfaction when browsing the website.
marketing-info: Prepare a strategy and objectives for the promotion of the brand provided by the client, using internet or other platforms to promote products and services of the brand in question.
maintenance-info: Complete maintenance of web pages to detect and solve errors, update content whether texts, photos, web design elements, add new functions, etc.
seo-info: Web positioning through SEO, so your website appears in the main search results according to your business, both on Google, Bing, or other internet search engines.
optimization-info: Complete optimization of your website, improving loading speed, using optimized images, a good URL, to give a better experience to users who visit the website.
about-info-1: Hi, I'm ANONIMO432HZ, passionate about programming, web development, and cybersecurity. Ever since I discovered web development, I felt a great fascination for the ability to create incredible things using code, and to this day I continue with that same motivation in every project I undertake.
about-info-2: I consider myself a self-taught person who enjoys constant daily learning, both of front-end/back-end development technologies and computer security tools and ethical hacking.
about-info-3: I have experience developing interactive web projects and security tools. I have participated in the development of utilities and scripts that facilitate system auditing and agile software development, adapting to the technological needs of each environment and continuously improving my best practices.
about-skills-1: More than a year of professional experience in this language allows me to perform without problems in the industry.
about-skills-2: More than a year of work experience in this language, I use it daily to develop web designs and interfaces.
about-skills-3: A year of experience using it in the front-end and back-end branch allowed me to get familiar with the language and include it in my work projects.
about-skills-4: One year using this preprocessor in the professional field, I include it in many of my projects since it allows me a better structured code.
about-skills-5: Less than a year using this framework, even so, I used it in countless work projects, which allowed me to get to know it for the most part.
about-skills-6: A year using this library in the personal and work environment, it is one of the libraries I use and manipulate the most.
about-skills-7: More than a year using this JavaScript framework, performing multiple personal and work projects.
about-skills-8: It is the cross-platform runtime environment that I use to make my web applications scalable.
about-skills-9: It is a framework that I use mostly to be able to manage my APIs in the best way and my http execution model.
services-questions-1: What is a responsive web page?
services-questions-p1: It is a page that is capable of adapting to any device where it is viewed, such as cell phones, tablets, laptops, without losing appearance or usability.
services-questions-2: What is a Domain and a Hosting?
services-questions-p2: Both are essential elements of a website. In short, the domain name is the address of the web page, while the hosting provides the space and resources necessary to launch the website.
services-questions-p3: Regular maintenance of your website allows you to attract and retain customers with new information, new products and services, in addition to helping you maintain or improve your ranking in Google.
services-questions-p4: You can pay online by credit or debit cards and payments by transfers.
